concerns.text: T009, T010, T043a all marked [P] but all modify code/data/validator.py. These cannot run in parallel safely — creates race condition risk for merge conflicts. Notes acknowledge this but task tags still show [P].

T026 conflates core invariant tabulation validation (Phase 1 scope) with algorithm validation for additional invariants (Phase 2+ per SC-010). Task description references 'algorithm validation' which violates Phase 1/Phase 2+ boundary.
T030b (tie-breaking validation script) depends on T030 (tie-breaking rules documentation) but explicit dependency not marked. Validation script cannot run until rules are documented.

T014 (retry logic) is tightly coupled to T013 (downloader) — retry logic is part of the downloader implementation. Separate task creates potential ordering confusion; should be combined or T014 explicitly marked dependent on T013.
